code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false

  while i < tokens.len() and not done
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end

    let n = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    if n < 0
      done = true
    else
      sum = sum + n
      i = i + 1
    end
  end

  print("partial=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
